description_long: This is a weathered wooden cabin with a rectangular footprint and a gable roof, featuring visible signs of age and damage such as missing roof shingles and broken wall panels. The exterior is clad in horizontal wooden planks, giving it a rustic and utilitarian appearance. There are several windows of varying sizes, some of which are broken or missing panes, and a large rectangular opening on one side. The roof has two prominent holes, suggesting disrepair or abandonment. One end of the cabin has a partially open section, possibly a porch or entryway, with slatted wooden railings. The overall structure appears simple and functional, suitable for rural or edge-of-urban environments.
description: A weathered wooden cabin with a gable roof, broken windows, and visible roof damage, featuring a rustic, aged appearance and a partially open porch area.
description_view_0: The cabin is seen from the side, showing the gable roof with two large holes and a partially open porch area with slatted railings.
description_view_1: This end view highlights the triangular gable, a small broken window, and the simple wooden plank siding.
description_view_2: The opposite side view reveals a large rectangular window opening, a smaller circular hole, and more roof damage.
description_view_3: The rear view displays two square windows and a solid wooden wall, with the gable roof above.
attribute_roof_type: gable roof with visible shingle damage and two large holes, constructed from wooden planks
attribute_window_arrangement: Asymmetrical arrangement with multiple small and medium rectangular windows, including a pair of square windows on the rear and a large rectangular opening on one side; some windows are broken or missing panes
attribute_door_placement: Single exterior door located at the partially open porch area on one side of the cabin
